title: SG Stackables
description: Simple mod to increase the stack size of items that are below 64 (except for tools and armor)
body:
Simple mod to increase the stack size of items that are below 64 (except for tools and armor) like:
- Enderpearls
- Totems
- Shulker boxes
- Beds
- Buckets
- Enchanted books
- Banners
- Minecarts
- Boats
- Music disks
- Armor stands
- Potion stacks are increased to 16
![Stacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51806460a48444597d470620106326ee8c2da886.png)
